title: Deleting Apps
drDigitalIntro:
Delete apps you don't use to free up space.
• On some computers it's called App Store, on others Play Store or Microsoft Store — they all work the same way.
• The app is removed, but your data may be saved in the cloud.
• You can reinstall any app later at no extra cost.

playgroundTask.goal: You deleted an app you no longer need

steps.say: Go to My Apps to see your installed apps.
Find Puzzle Quest and click the Delete button to remove it.

drDigitalSuccess: You deleted an app! You can always reinstall it for free from the App Market later.
drDigitalHint: Go to My Apps, find the app you want to remove, and click the Delete button.
